response:
This is a reference bitwise implementation of the standard IEEE 802.3 CRC-32 error-detection checksum algorithm, using the widely used reflected (least-significant-bit first) polynomial constant `0xEDB88320`.
It initializes the checksum register to all 1 bits, processes every input bit via iterative binary polynomial long division, then inverts all bits of the final register value to produce the standard CRC32 result.
